transcript.text: Hello Gladston , I am Priya from Kaya Clinic. Is this right time to talk to you?
Yes.
[Warmly] You recently filled out a form on our website. Could you tell me about the concern you'd like to address — skin, hair, or something else?
मुझे skin related.
No, I don't.
[Empathetically] I apologize, I seem to have missed your previous response. Could you please tell me again about the concern you'd like to address? I want to make sure I understand correctly.
General, general, okay.
[Patiently] Thank you for clarifying. So, you have a general skin concern. Our dermatologist will evaluate it and create a personalised plan for you.
Okay.
[Warmly] I have your first name as Gladston — could I get your last name?
Sikuerah.
[Warmly] Thank you. And which city are you based in?
Um, I am speaking from Surat.
[Warmly] Just to confirm — you're looking for a branch in Surat, right?
[Warmly] In Surat, we have two branches: Vesu and Ghod Dod Road. Which one would be more convenient for you?
Mm, Vesu.
[Warmly] I'll note your appointment at Vesu, Surat. What date and time would be best for your visit?
Hmm.
[Patiently] We are open from 10 AM to 8 PM, Monday to Saturday. What date and time works for you?
[Warmly] And which date would that be?
हम्म, 4 PM।
[Patiently] Could you please tell me the specific date for your 4 PM appointment?
4th June को।
[Warmly] Thank you. So that's June 4th at 4 PM at our Vesu branch in Surat.
Yes.
[Warmly] A basic consultation is completely free. If a detailed medical evaluation is needed, the fee is Rs. 750.
Okay.
[Warmly] A basic consultation is completely free. If a detailed medical evaluation is needed, the fee is Rs. 750.
[Warmly] What is your email address, please?
अच्छा।
Uh, gladstonsquare-98@gmail.com.
[Warmly] Could you spell that for me, using words for tricky letters like T for Tiger or E for Egg?
Yes. Um, G-L-A-D-S-T-O-N, Gladston. Sequira, S-E-Q-U-I-R-A, 98@gmail.com.
[Warmly] Thank you. So that's G-L-A-D-S-T-O-N-S-E-Q-U-I-R-A-9-8, at gmail dot com — sahi hai?
[Warmly] And your date of birth?
हाँ जी, सही है।
Kyun? Isse kya hoga?
[Patiently] It is for accurate patient identification in our medical records.
मैं कितने बात कर
[Patiently] Could you please share your date of birth?
Aap Hindi mein baat kar sakte hain
[Warmly] Haan bilkul, main aapse Hindi mein baat kar sakti hoon. Aapki date of birth kya hai?
Theek hai. 28th June,2000.
[Warmly] Dhanyavaad. Aur aapka 6-digit pin code kya hai?
Pin code नहीं पता मुझे, में ही मेरा चलेगा।
[Patiently] Koi baat nahi. Aapka concern general skin ka hai, right?
Haan ji.
[Warmly] Theek hai. Aapka naam Gladston Sequeira hai, appointment Vesu branch, Surat mein 4th June ko shaam 4 baje hai, aur aapka concern general skin ka hai. Kya sab details sahi hain?
[Warmly] Aapki appointment book ho gayi hai aur aapko jald hi confirmation mil jayega. Have a wonderful day, bye!
